sourceMovie.title: Little Man
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Little Man works as a comedy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The comedy and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Raising Arizona
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Little Man clicked for you, Raising Arizona (1987) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and crime, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Little Man?
faq.answer: Try Raising Arizona, Defendor, The Ladykillers—each shares DNA with Little Man while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Little Man?
faq.answer: Little Man (2006) is best described as Comedy, Crime. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Little Man worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
